notes: Conservative live rule mapping from Phase 7 findings.
No unsupported track aliasing is applied.
Costs are computed from permutation counts and a configurable base stake.

rules.plain_english: Belmont Park, race 5+, fast/Firm conditions, 11-13 runners, favorite at least 35% implied win probability, favorite-second gap at least 22%, play Key-1-with-7.
Oaklawn Park, race 7+, 11-12 runners, favorite-second gap at least 5%, play Key-1-with-7.
Churchill Downs, 10-11 runners, favorite-second gap at least 15%, play Key-1-with-8.
